scripts.cdk: docker build -t oidc-base:latest -f Dockerfile . && npm run build && npx dotenv -e .env.prod -- npx cdk synth CognitoStack-prod --require-approval never --ci true --strict --validation && ./scripts/clean-tests.sh
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:system
scripts.test:web:ci: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.ci -- playwright test tests/web.live.test.ts
scripts.test:web:prod: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.prod -- playwright test tests/web.live.test.ts
scripts.test:web:cognito:ci: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.ci -- playwright test tests/webCognito.live.test.ts
scripts.test:web:cognito:prod: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.prod -- playwright test tests/webCognito.live.test.ts
scripts.test:api:ci: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.ci -- playwright test tests/api.live.test.ts
scripts.test:api:prod: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.prod -- playwright test tests/api.live.test.ts
scripts.test:load:ci: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.ci -- k6 run tests/load.live.test.js
scripts.test:load:prod: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.prod -- k6 run tests/load.live.test.js
scripts.test:load:cognito:ci: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.ci -- k6 run tests/loadCognito.live.test.js
scripts.test:load:cognito:prod: npx dotenv -e .env -- npx dotenv -e .env.prod -- k6 run tests/loadCognito.live.test.js
